testsuite.name: GET /api/products/filter

testcase.name: CT016 Filter With No Products In Range Returns 200
CT017 Filter With Invalid Price Range Returns 400
CT015 Filter Products In Valid Price Range Returns 200
CT019 Filter With Min Equals Max Boundary Returns 200
CT020 Filter With Zero Min Price Returns 200
CT018 Filter With Missing Price Range Param Returns 400
